Revenue reporting

Pipeline-grade measurement

Reality check

Noise is usually a systems problem—not a channel problem.

We work with leaders who want proof: what to do, why it matters, and how we will show impact on pipeline and margin.

Traffic without pipeline

Rankings and clicks look fine—but SQLs do not move. We connect acquisition to conversion and revenue proof.

Fragmented channels

Paid, organic, email, and sales tell different stories. We align messaging, measurement, and handoffs.

Brittle tracking

If leadership cannot trust the numbers, teams optimize opinions. We build GA4/GTM foundations you can defend.

AI-powered growth systems

We automate the repetitive 80% so your team owns strategy.

Replace manual follow-up, triage, and reporting with measured AI layers—then scale what already wins. This is the architecture prospects feel in the first three seconds: advanced, intentional, expensive.

Automation fabric · policy gates · live routing

Website, WhatsApp, and Messenger assistants that answer, qualify, and escalate—grounded in your real policies and offers.

Capabilities

Full-funnel marketing with senior oversight.

Every capability is executed with documentation, QA, and reporting your CFO will not roll their eyes at.

Search Engine Optimization

Earn durable organic demand with a search strategy built on technical excellence, intent-led content, and authoritative signals.

Explore →

Local SEO

Win the map pack and localized SERPs when buyers search for services “near me” or in your target cities.

Explore →

Technical SEO

Make your site crawlable, fast, and indexable—so every other marketing dollar performs better.

Explore →

Pay-Per-Click Advertising

Google Ads and Meta campaigns engineered for pipeline—structured for learning, scaled with governance.

Explore →

Social Media Marketing

Paid and organic social that builds familiarity, trust, and demand—anchored to a clear offer and CTA.

Explore →

Social Media Management

Day-to-day publishing, community care, and reporting—so your brand stays active and on-message.

Explore →

Content Marketing

Editorial programs that earn trust and rank—mapped to revenue, not arbitrary publishing quotas.

Explore →

Copywriting

Conversion copy for ads, landing pages, and emails—clear, specific, and tested.

Explore →

Email Marketing & Automation

Lifecycle email that nurtures leads, recovers revenue, and scales personalization responsibly.

Explore →

Conversion Rate Optimization

Evidence-led experimentation that increases revenue per visitor—without guessing.

Explore →

Funnel Building

End-to-end funnels that connect acquisition, nurture, and sales—measured at every step.

Explore →

Branding & Positioning

Clarify your category, differentiation, and narrative—so marketing and sales speak one language.

Explore →

Website Design & Development

Fast, credible, conversion-minded sites—built with modern stacks and SEO-aware architecture.

Explore →

Landing Page Optimization

High-intent pages engineered for one job: convert the click into the next step.

Explore →

Marketing Automation

Orchestrate campaigns across channels with CRM-connected automation and clean data.

Explore →

Analytics & Tracking

GA4, GTM, event models, and dashboards that leadership trusts—built for decisions, not charts.

Services overviewAI systems hub

Operating system

Diagnose → design → ship → compound.

We are not a ticket factory. We partner with your team, protect brand quality, and tie every decision to business outcomes.
01

Diagnose

Economics, funnel leaks, and technical constraints—before we spend a dollar on tactics.

02

Design

A prioritized roadmap: quick wins, structural bets, and clear success metrics.

03

Ship

Execution with QA discipline: launches, tests, and documentation your team can run.

04

Compound

Weekly learning loops. Scale what wins; cut what fails—without ego.

Proof

Outcomes we aim for—by stage and category.

Representative patterns. In proposals we benchmark against your market and your data maturity.

−62% average speed-to-lead

AI qualification + CRM routing

Web + WhatsApp flows, after-hours capture, and automated handoff so sales only talks to ready buyers.

GGNK Marketing

GNK Marketing is an AI-first performance agency. We build automated growth systems—chatbots, funnels, ads ops, and analytics—alongside SEO, paid media, and CRO to turn traffic into pipeline and revenue.
